response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack engineering experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) directly aligned with the role. Strong polyglot background, demonstrated architecture work, TDD/CI/CD practices, and experience across cloud/Kubernetes, MongoDB, and React. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention and limited recent React depth, but the overall profile strongly fits a senior IC role on internal automation tooling.
strengths: Recent AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work directly matches an explicit job requirement
Polyglot experience across TypeScript, Java, C/C++, DLang with TDD/CI-CD discipline
10+ years full-stack with architecture, Kubernetes, Docker, and MongoDB experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in primary stack
Vitest/Jest/Playwright testing frameworks not specifically mentioned (D-lang test tooling instead)
React exposure appears limited to one role; depth unclear for frontend-heavy features

key_factors.factor: Years and breadth of full-stack experience
Missing Nest.js and JS-ecosystem test framework evidence
